Measurement
A report is generated on a monthly basis, this report is based on the CMDB and lists all servers and service details for which a Cegeka datacentre – Managed Hypervisor OS Service is delivered.
Billing
The units are billed against the price of their respective SKU’s.
(“Price/Unit” x “Quantity of Virtual – Gold Units”) +(“Price/Unit” x “Quantity of Virtual – Silver Units”) + (“Price/Unit” x “Quantity of Virtual – Bronze Units”).

This introduction and document history below are for internal use only. It is allowed to merge Chapter 1 with other service descriptions into a single service catalog.
